about.title: Project 6388
about.subtitle: A card game experiment archive — exploring mechanisms, documenting prototypes, and sharing print-and-play files for anyone to try.

whatIs.heading: What is Project 6388?
whatIs.p1: Project 6388 is a personal card-based board game experiment project. Each game is independently developed and version-controlled, with rulebooks and Print-and-Play (PnP) files available for anyone to print and play.
whatIs.p2: "6388" comes from the standard card size: 63×88 mm.

principles.heading: Design Principles
items: No language elements — cards contain no text
Most games use only standard 63×88 mm cards

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.p1: Each game uses a Saturn moon name as its codename (e.g. Mimas, Enceladus, Tethys). Codenames are development identifiers — final game names may change at any time.
howItWorks.p2: Each game has its own GitHub repository, and every release includes a rulebook (PDF) and PnP file (ZIP). This website serves as a hub, providing download links to those files.

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Games currently in development or publicly available. Download rulebooks and PnP files directly.
games.emptyState: No games found with this status.

meta.siteDescription: A card-based board game experiment archive — mechanism experiments built entirely from cards, no language elements.
